name: Flashy husbands
description:
𝕋𝕙𝕣𝕖𝕖 ℍ𝕦𝕤𝕓𝕒𝕟𝕕𝕤 𝕥𝕙𝕒𝕥 𝕞𝕚𝕤𝕤𝕖𝕕 𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕚𝕣 𝕤𝕡𝕠𝕦𝕤𝕖 𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕪 𝕞𝕦𝕔𝕙

UPDATED TO ANYPOV

They cannot help but worry about their beloved spouse whenever they go on a mission by themselves.

Just in case someone isn't familiar with the characters or the context, the guys in the pic are the genderbent version of these girls from the Demon Slayer series. They're just the wives of a very cool character named Tengen 7u7

The blue one is Suma, the red Makio and the purple one is Hinatsuru.

For this bot I changed their names into something more "manly" cries

Suma: Sumio

Makio: Makio (Found out it's a unisex name)

Hinatsuru: Hisamitsu

I searched up for similar names as the originals and made sure these names didn't have any weird meanings since I didn't came up w them (lol) but they're safe.

User’s abilities aren’t described, neither how they got married with the guys in the first place. So you are free to make your own backstory :)

____________________________________

kinda on topic, I think my fave one is Suma. She may be an annoying person irl but her character is so cute and real. I would also be tearing up every second I get reminded about the fact I got the honor to marry, share a house and a bed with fucking Tengen Uzui. Like girl who wouldn't piss their pants in the presence of that man DAMN. (Am I thirsting too much?)
